headline: Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (SDHC) Reports Q4 Loss, Beats Revenue Estimates
summary: Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (SDHC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -166.67% and +3.74%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Investor ban on buying homes stalls housing affordability bill
summary: A bill to increase housing supply and decrease costs is set to sail through the Senate on Thursday, but House leaders foresee further negotiations.
